title: Principal Radiologist at Max Healthcare International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Max Healthcare International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Max Healthcare International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Radiologist to join our dynamic team in Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Max Healthcare International Enterprises:
Max Healthcare International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Healthcare International Enterprises!
